features: NIGHT LIGHT FOR BABY'S ROOM: Bunny shaped silicone night light emits a soft and soothing glow under the soft eco-friendly silicone cover, which won't disturb your baby or other members at night. Highly recommended for baby night light in children's room, it is also practical for mothers who change nappies and breastfeeding at night.

CUTE BUNNY LIGHT: The bunny-shaped night light is made of BPA-free silicone, which is soft, washable and hygienic for your baby. Warm white and 7-colour breathing mode. This night light is an ideal gift for babies, children, boys and girls, teenagers, new mums and bunny lovers. BIRTHDAY GIFTS FOR BOYS AND GIRLS: Battery operated portable size and soft colours make it perfect for cute night lights, girls night lights, kids night lights, kids and nursery LED night lights.
BIRTHDAY GIFT FOR BOYS AND GIRLS: Battery operated portable size and soft colours make it a cute night light, perfect as a girl's night light, children's night light, kindergarten LED night light.

LONG LASTING COMPANION: Kawaii night light has a built-in 1200 mAh lithium battery that can be recharged via USB and features an energy-saving LED light source that can work for 12 hours of continuous operation on a 2-hour charge, emitting a warm white light. It is a good companion for taking care of your baby at night, allowing your baby to fall asleep quickly in a warm and soft atmosphere.

EASY TO CONTROL AND RECHARGEABLE: The Bunny LED Night Light includes Tap and remote control to change the colour of the light. Place the baby bedroom light on the bedside table, kids can easily click to control the colour of the light. Easy to carry portable design, kids can hold the night light in the bathroom in the middle of the night to see clearly without having to turn on the ambient light to wake everyone up.
